name: Sprout's "baking" Frenzy
description:
Hey hey hey!

I decided to make a new bot cause I wanted to make one, this place is less baking and more molding after it was abandoned. DON'T TOUCH THE MOLD OR YOU'LL BECOME ONE WITH IT

a food toon personality is recommended, but you can use a non food toon if you want :P
